evals.prompt: Write a test charter for exploring a new checkout flow with payment method variations
expected_patterns: payment OR card OR payment method
edge cases OR error handling OR boundary
anti_patterns: what to prove instead of what to learn
target not specific enough to guide 45-90 minutes

evals.prompt: Design a session log template for capturing observations during a 60-minute exploratory testing session
expected_patterns: BUG OR QUESTION OR IDEA OR RISK OR NOTE
anti_patterns: summary after the fact instead of during session

evals.prompt: Explain how to apply the HICCUPS heuristic to find bugs in a user profile edit page
expected_patterns: History OR I - Image OR Comparable OR Claims OR User expectations OR Product OR Standards
past behavior OR consistency OR brand OR spec OR expectations OR standards OR WCAG
at least 4 of: H, I, C, C, U, P, S
anti_patterns: treats HICCUPS as a checklist to complete exhaustively
no connection to actual bugs found

evals.prompt: Design boundary test cases for a numeric input field that accepts cart quantities
anti_patterns: no edge cases at zero or maximum
vague boundaries instead of specific values

evals.prompt: Conduct a debrief after a 75-minute exploratory session on a new feature and document findings using the debrief template
expected_patterns: Findings: OR Bugs: OR Test ideas:
anti_patterns: findings not categorized (bugs vs issues vs test ideas)
no reflection on what was unexpected

evals.prompt: Investigate a vague bug report ('sometimes the search is slow') using exploratory testing and describe your charter, session flow, and what you would document
expected_patterns: slow network OR 3G OR throttle OR large dataset OR concurrent users
reproduce OR vary OR screenshot OR network trace

evals.prompt: Convert an exploratory finding (email field accepts empty on checkout) into an automated regression test
expected_patterns: Email is required OR validation error
anti_patterns: no test reference to the original bug
no assertion on the validation error
does not verify that invalid state is prevented

evals.prompt: Apply FEW HICCUPS (Familiarity, Explainability, World) to explore a multi-language checkout experience for bugs
expected_patterns: Familiarity OR first-time user OR without help
Explainability OR explain the behavior OR unclear
World OR locales OR time zones OR network OR screen sizes OR RTL
RTL OR emoji OR CJK OR Unicode OR locale-specific OR number format
anti_patterns: no mention of first-time user perspective
missing at least 2 of the 3 F-E-W lenses
no connection to how real users in different regions behave

evals.prompt: Plan a regression exploratory session after a developer fixed a concurrency bug in real-time collaboration. Define the charter and state transition test ideas
expected_patterns: regression OR side effects OR integration points
concurrent OR two users OR race condition OR conflict resolution
State transition: OR skip a step OR go backward OR interrupt OR repeat OR timeout
anti_patterns: does not address state transition scenarios from the heuristic
assumes the fix is complete without testing edge cases

evals.prompt: Describe when to use exploratory testing vs automated testing for a new feature request, and explain the exploration-to-automation pipeline
expected_patterns: new OR evolving OR complex OR subjective
file bug report OR developer fixes OR write automated test OR prevent regression
anti_patterns: treats exploration as less rigorous than automation
no pipeline from finding to regression test
missing the decision framework (new vs stable)
